creator: big_jaa@hotmail.com
text:
I cannot install FreeBSD Release 4.8 on Dell PowerEdge SC1420,
when I boot it up with CD-Rom that contain FreeBSD4.8 after that its shown a hardware list in the machine and stop at this line
"plip0: <PLIP network interface> on ppbus0"

and system was freezed forever........

How-To-Repeat: I disable NIC, but problem still occur.
I tried to install FreeBSD Release 6.1, it works properly.

Why??
